channel.title: Company News Monitor SEC Filings
channel.description: Recent SEC filings for companies tracked by Company News Monitor.

item.title: Adyen F-6EF for 2026-04-10
item.description: Adyen N.V. filed a American depositary receipt registration (F-6EF) on 2026-04-10. Open the SEC filing for source documents. Adyen's U.S. OTC ADR does not file periodic 20-F or 6-K reports; coverage reflects ADR registration and ownership filings.
